case_title: CITY AND COUNTY SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. MATTHEW R. VILLARINA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
